# -*- coding: utf-8 -*- """ 把 转正答辩_v3_动画版.html 反向解析回 .pptx 约定： - HTML 内每个 .deck-slide section = 一页 - section 内递归收集所有 .shp，每个 .shp = 一个 textbox（带 fill / border / rotation） - .shp 内文字：递归收集所有

，但跳过已经被嵌套 .shp 占据的部分 - 单独识别为 PowerPoint 原生表格 - px → EMU：1 px = 9525 EMU（96 DPI） - 字体：默认 Noto Sans SC（中文）+ Noto Sans（拉丁），含 Consolas/Mono 时改 Consolas """ from __future__ import annotations import re from pathlib import Path from bs4 import BeautifulSoup, NavigableString, Tag from lxml import etree from pptx import Presentation from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor from pptx.enum.text import MSO_ANCHOR, PP_ALIGN from pptx.oxml.ns import qn from pptx.util import Emu, Pt HERE = Path(__file__).parent SRC = HERE / "转正答辩_v3_动画版.html" DST = HERE / "转正答辩_v3_动画版_从HTML.pptx" EMU_PER_PX = 9525 # 96 DPI SLIDE_W_PX = 1280 SLIDE_H_PX = 720 DEFAULT_FONT_CN = "Noto Sans SC" DEFAULT_FONT_LATIN = "Noto Sans" DEFAULT_FONT_MONO = "Consolas" DEFAULT_FONT_SIZE_PT = 14 DEFAULT_TEXT_COLOR = "050505" # ---------------- 样式解析 ---------------- STYLE_KV_RE = re.compile(r"\s*([\w\-]+)\s*:\s*([^;]+?)\s*(?:;|$)") def parse_style(style_str: str | None) -> dict: if not style_str: return {} out = {} for m in STYLE_KV_RE.finditer(style_str): out[m.group(1).lower()] = m.group(2).strip() return out def px_value(s: str | None) -> float | None: if not s: return None m = re.match(r"^(-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*px\s*$", s.strip()) if m: return float(m.group(1)) m = re.match(r"^(-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*$", s.strip()) if m: return float(m.group(1)) return None def pt_value(s: str | None) -> float | None: if not s: return None m = re.match(r"^(-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*pt\s*$", s.strip()) if m: return float(m.group(1)) return None def hex_color(s: str | None) -> str | None: if not s: return None m = re.search(r"#([0-9A-Fa-f]{6,8})", s) if m: return m.group(1)[:6].upper() return None def parse_border(s: str | None) -> dict | None: """解析 'border:0.75pt solid #F1F1F1' 或 'border:1.5pt solid #FF7A3D'。""" if not s: return None width_m = re.search(r"(-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*(pt|px)", s) color_m = re.search(r"#([0-9A-Fa-f]{6,8})", s) if not color_m: return None width_pt = 0.75 if width_m: v = float(width_m.group(1)) unit = width_m.group(2) if unit == "px": width_pt = v * 0.75 else: width_pt = v return {"color": color_m.group(1)[:6].upper(), "width_pt": width_pt} def parse_rotation(transform: str | None) -> float: if not transform: return 0.0 m = re.search(r"rotate\(\s*(-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*deg\s*\)", transform) return float(m.group(1)) if m else 0.0 VANCHOR_MAP = { "flex-start": MSO_ANCHOR.TOP, "center": MSO_ANCHOR.MIDDLE, "flex-end": MSO_ANCHOR.BOTTOM, } ALIGN_MAP = { "left": PP_ALIGN.LEFT, "center": PP_ALIGN.CENTER, "right": PP_ALIGN.RIGHT, "justify": PP_ALIGN.JUSTIFY, } def font_kind(font_family: str | None) -> str: """根据 font-family 判断字体大类：mono / default。""" if not font_family: return "default" s = font_family.lower() if "consolas" in s or "monospace" in s or "courier" in s or "mono" in s: return "mono" return "default" # ---------------- 字体设置（east-asia + ascii 双轨）---------------- def set_run_font(run, *, size_pt, bold, italic, color_hex, kind): font = run.font font.size = Pt(size_pt) font.bold = bool(bold) font.italic = bool(italic) if color_hex: font.color.rgb = RGBColor.from_string(color_hex) if kind == "mono": latin_name = DEFAULT_FONT_MONO ea_name = DEFAULT_FONT_MONO else: latin_name = DEFAULT_FONT_LATIN ea_name = DEFAULT_FONT_CN font.name = latin_name rPr = run._r.get_or_add_rPr() for tag in ("eastAsia", "cs", "ascii", "hAnsi"): for el in rPr.findall(qn(f"a:{tag}")): rPr.remove(el) for tag, name in (("ascii", latin_name), ("hAnsi", latin_name), ("eastAsia", ea_name), ("cs", ea_name)): el = etree.SubElement(rPr, qn(f"a:{tag}")) el.set("typeface", name) # ---------------- p / span → run 列表 ---------------- def iter_runs_from_p(p_tag: Tag, parent_p_style: dict): """把一个

解析成 [(text, span_style_dict), ...]，
用特殊标记 ('\n', None) 表示段落分隔。""" out = [] for child in p_tag.children: if isinstance(child, NavigableString): t = str(child) if t.strip() == "": continue out.append((t, parent_p_style)) elif isinstance(child, Tag): if child.name == "br": out.append(("__BR__", None)) elif child.name == "span": span_style = parse_style(child.get("style")) merged = {**parent_p_style, **span_style} inner_text = child.get_text(strip=False) if inner_text.strip() == "": continue out.append((inner_text, merged)) else: # 其他内联标签（很少见），按文本处理 t = child.get_text(strip=False) if t.strip(): out.append((t, parent_p_style)) return out def fill_text_frame(text_frame, p_tags: list[Tag], v_anchor): text_frame.word_wrap = True text_frame.margin_left = 0 text_frame.margin_right = 0 text_frame.margin_top = 0 text_frame.margin_bottom = 0 text_frame.vertical_anchor = v_anchor if not p_tags: return first = True for p_tag in p_tags: p_style = parse_style(p_tag.get("style")) align_str = (p_style.get("text-align") or "left").lower() align = ALIGN_MAP.get(align_str, PP_ALIGN.LEFT) runs = iter_runs_from_p(p_tag, p_style) def new_paragraph(): if first_p_holder["first"]: p = text_frame.paragraphs[0] first_p_holder["first"] = False else: p = text_frame.add_paragraph() p.alignment = align p.line_spacing = 1.2 return p first_p_holder = {"first": first} # 把 __BR__ 拆成新段（pptx 同段内换行不易实现，按段处理） cur_p = new_paragraph() if not runs: # 空段（


或全空白） run = cur_p.add_run() run.text = "" set_run_font(run, size_pt=DEFAULT_FONT_SIZE_PT, bold=False, italic=False, color_hex=DEFAULT_TEXT_COLOR, kind="default") else: for text, st in runs: if text == "__BR__": cur_p = new_paragraph() continue run = cur_p.add_run() run.text = text size_pt = pt_value(st.get("font-size")) if st else None if size_pt is None: size_pt = DEFAULT_FONT_SIZE_PT color = hex_color(st.get("color")) if st else None if color is None: color = DEFAULT_TEXT_COLOR bold = (st.get("font-weight", "") in ("700", "bold")) if st else False italic = (st.get("font-style", "") == "italic") if st else False kind = font_kind(st.get("font-family") if st else None) set_run_font(run, size_pt=size_pt, bold=bold, italic=italic, color_hex=color, kind=kind) first = first_p_holder["first"] # ---------------- shape 渲染 ---------------- def collect_my_paragraphs(shp_div: Tag) -> list[Tag]: """收集 shp_div 内所有

，但跳过嵌套 .shp 内的（让那个 .shp 自己渲染）。 使用 BFS，遇到 .shp 子节点不进入。""" result = [] stack = list(shp_div.children) while stack: node = stack.pop(0) if not isinstance(node, Tag): continue # 嵌套 .shp 不进入 if "shp" in (node.get("class") or []): continue if node.name == "table": # 表格不当 p 处理 continue if node.name == "p" and "pp" in (node.get("class") or []): result.append(node) continue # 其他容器（div / span / thead 等）：继续向内 stack[0:0] = list(node.children) return result def find_inner_table(shp_div: Tag) -> Tag | None: """寻找 shp_div 内（不在嵌套 .shp 中的）第一个

。""" stack = list(shp_div.children) while stack: node = stack.pop(0) if not isinstance(node, Tag): continue if "shp" in (node.get("class") or []): continue if node.name == "table": return node stack[0:0] = list(node.children) return None def emu(px: float | None) -> int: if px is None: return 0 return int(round(px * EMU_PER_PX)) def render_shp_as_textbox(slide, shp_div: Tag): style = parse_style(shp_div.get("style")) left = px_value(style.get("left")) top = px_value(style.get("top")) width = px_value(style.get("width")) height = px_value(style.get("height")) if left is None or top is None or width is None or height is None: return None # 高度=0 的"分割线" shape：给一个 1px 最小高，避免 textbox 报错 if height < 1: height = 1 if width < 1: width = 1 fill_hex = hex_color(style.get("background")) # border 可能写成 border:..., border-left:..., border-right:..., border-top:..., border-bottom:... border = parse_border(style.get("border")) if not border: for edge in ("border-top", "border-bottom", "border-left", "border-right"): b = parse_border(style.get(edge)) if b: border = b break rotation = parse_rotation(style.get("transform")) v_anchor = VANCHOR_MAP.get((style.get("justify-content") or "").lower(), MSO_ANCHOR.TOP) tb = slide.shapes.add_textbox(emu(left), emu(top), emu(width), emu(height)) # fill if fill_hex: tb.fill.solid() tb.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor.from_string(fill_hex) else: tb.fill.background() # border if border: tb.line.color.rgb = RGBColor.from_string(border["color"]) tb.line.width = Pt(border["width_pt"]) else: tb.line.fill.background() # rotation if abs(rotation) > 0.01: tb.rotation = rotation # 文字 p_tags = collect_my_paragraphs(shp_div) fill_text_frame(tb.text_frame, p_tags, v_anchor) return tb def render_html_table(slide, table_tag: Tag, parent_shp: Tag | None): """粗略地渲染
：用 shp 父容器的位置 + 内边距估算。""" # 估算位置：父 shp 区域 + 24px 左右内边距 + 50px 顶部内边距 if parent_shp is None: return p_style = parse_style(parent_shp.get("style")) p_left = px_value(p_style.get("left")) or 0 p_top = px_value(p_style.get("top")) or 0 p_w = px_value(p_style.get("width")) or 0 p_h = px_value(p_style.get("height")) or 0 pad_x, pad_y_top, pad_y_bottom = 24, 60, 16 tx = p_left + pad_x tw = max(40, p_w - pad_x * 2) rows = table_tag.find_all("tr") if not rows: return cols_n = max(len(r.find_all(["td", "th"])) for r in rows) rows_n = len(rows) th = max(40, p_h - pad_y_top - pad_y_bottom) ty = p_top + pad_y_top pp_table = slide.shapes.add_table(rows_n, cols_n, emu(tx), emu(ty), emu(tw), emu(th)).table # 第一列稍窄一点（看 HTML 表格通常第一列固定宽） first_col_px = None first_th = rows[0].find(["td", "th"]) if first_th is not None: s0 = parse_style(first_th.get("style")) first_col_px = px_value(s0.get("width")) if first_col_px: pp_table.columns[0].width = emu(first_col_px) rest_w = (tw - first_col_px) / max(1, (cols_n - 1)) for ci in range(1, cols_n): pp_table.columns[ci].width = emu(rest_w) for ri, row in enumerate(rows): cells = row.find_all(["td", "th"]) for ci in range(cols_n): cell = pp_table.cell(ri, ci) cell.fill.background() cell.margin_left = Emu(emu(8)) cell.margin_right = Emu(emu(8)) cell.margin_top = Emu(emu(4)) cell.margin_bottom = Emu(emu(4)) tf = cell.text_frame tf.word_wrap = True p = tf.paragraphs[0] p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT run = p.add_run() if ci < len(cells): td = cells[ci] td_style = parse_style(td.get("style")) run.text = td.get_text(strip=True) size_pt = pt_value(td_style.get("font-size")) or 11 color = hex_color(td_style.get("color")) or DEFAULT_TEXT_COLOR bold = td_style.get("font-weight", "") in ("700", "bold") or td.name == "th" kind = font_kind(td_style.get("font-family")) set_run_font(run, size_pt=size_pt, bold=bold, italic=False, color_hex=color, kind=kind) else: run.text = "" set_run_font(run, size_pt=11, bold=False, italic=False, color_hex=DEFAULT_TEXT_COLOR, kind="default") # ---------------- 主流程 ---------------- def parent_shp_of(node: Tag) -> Tag | None: """向上找第一个 .shp 祖先。""" cur = node.parent while cur is not None and isinstance(cur, Tag): if "shp" in (cur.get("class") or []): return cur cur = cur.parent return None def main(): html = SRC.read_text(encoding="utf-8") soup = BeautifulSoup(html, "lxml") sections = soup.find_all("section", class_="deck-slide") print(f"slides found: {len(sections)}") prs = Presentation() prs.slide_width = Emu(SLIDE_W_PX * EMU_PER_PX) prs.slide_height = Emu(SLIDE_H_PX * EMU_PER_PX) blank_layout = prs.slide_layouts[6] # blank for i, section in enumerate(sections, start=1): slide = prs.slides.add_slide(blank_layout) # 页面背景 sec_style = parse_style(section.get("style")) bg_hex = hex_color(sec_style.get("background")) or "FFFFFF" if bg_hex.upper() != "FFFFFF": bg = slide.background fill = bg.fill fill.solid() fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor.from_string(bg_hex) # 渲染所有 .shp（按文档顺序，包含嵌套） shps = section.find_all("div", class_="shp") for shp in shps: try: render_shp_as_textbox(slide, shp) except Exception as e: print(f" [slide {i}] shp render error: {e}") # 渲染所有 .table（不在嵌套 .shp 内的归属于其最近 .shp 父容器） tables = section.find_all("table") for tb_tag in tables: parent = parent_shp_of(tb_tag) try: render_html_table(slide, tb_tag, parent) except Exception as e: print(f" [slide {i}] table render error: {e}") print(f" slide {i:02d}: shapes={len(shps)} tables={len(tables)}") prs.save(DST) print(f"wrote: {DST} ({DST.stat().st_size / 1024:.1f} KB)") if __name__ == "__main__": main()

找到根因了：**HTML 里有大量 `<div style="display:none">` 包着的旧版本 `.shp`**（page 5 末尾、page 8 末尾都有），我的脚本没识别 `display:none` 就把这些"隐藏元素"也渲染了，导致跟新版本叠在一起，看起来错乱。

让我先确认其他页是否也有同样的隐藏元素，并去看 slide 8 的具体情况。

 找到根因了。Slide 5 的 HTML 结构中，新版的正确内容被包含在一个 div 里，而旧的坐标错乱的元素已经被全量替换，现在被 display:none 隐藏了。

问题是 BeautifulSoup 的 find_all 不会忽略 display 属性，所以它把隐藏的旧元素也全部提取出来渲染了——这些旧元素有些坐标近乎为零（left:0.62px 这样），有些是大字号的"9件事,3大类"，直接跟新版的内容重叠。解决方案很简单：在解析时跳过任何在 display:none 容器里的元素。Slide 8 的问题也是类似的——那两个白卡可能是空的，或者内容是通过 JavaScript 动态加载的。

我还发现 slide 5 的新版 shape 大量使用了嵌套 div 和 p 标签，我的脚本把所有这些 p 都按父 shape 的位置渲染，导致"PRODUCT LAUNCH / IMC"、"产品上市 / IMC"、"3"、"件 · 1 已完成 / 2 进行中"这些全部堆叠在一起——这跟 slide 13 是同样的问题。所以我需要修三个问题：忽略 display:none 容器里的元素、把嵌套 div 当成独立的伪子 shape 来处理位置信息、还有处理 font-family 在父级 div 上时子 span 没有继承的情况。

修复方案里，A 比较直接，就是解析时移除 display:none 的容器；B 比较复杂，需要对每个 shape 内的非 shape 包装 div 估算它们的位置。

对于 PPT 这种绝对定位的场景，最稳妥的做法其实是把整个 .shp 当作一个文本框，让内容按正常流从上到下排列，PPT 自动换行处理。这样会失去一些高级布局效果（比如底部对齐、flex 布局），但从 slide 5 的截图来看，即使文字堆叠在一起，因为字号差异很大（9pt 到 42pt），视觉上其实还是能看出从上到下的排列顺序，没有想象中那么糟。

仔细看截图才发现真正的问题不在 B，而在 A——HTML 里新旧两个版本的 shape 同时被渲染了，新版的内容和被 display:none 隐藏的旧版内容重叠在同一个区域（96-280px），所以才看起来混乱。只要修掉 A，slide 5 就会恢复正常。现在需要检查 slide 8 的 HTML，看看上半部分那两个空白卡片的问题。

def strip_hidden(soup: BeautifulSoup) -> int:
    """移除所有 style 含 display:none 的元素（连子树一起删）。返回删除条数。"""
    removed = 0
    for el in soup.find_all(style=True):
        st = el.get("style", "")
        if re.search(r"display\s*:\s*none\b", st, re.IGNORECASE):
            el.decompose()
            removed += 1
    return removed


def main():
    html = SRC.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    soup = BeautifulSoup(html, "lxml")

    n_hidden = strip_hidden(soup)
    print(f"removed display:none nodes: {n_hidden}")

    sections = soup.find_all("section", class_="deck-slide")
    print(f"slides found: {len(sections)}")

实现简化版 flex 引擎。我要把 `render_shp_as_textbox` 重构成支持嵌套 flex 拆分的递归 `render_box`。

 用户选择了继续实现简化版的 flex 拆分功能。我需要处理当 .shp 元素设置了 `display:flex` 且包含嵌套 div 子级时，将每个嵌套 div 转换为独立的子 textbox，根据 flex 的行列方向来估算它们的位置和尺寸，同时这些子 textbox 也要支持自身的背景、边框和内边距属性，并且整个过程需要支持递归处理。

关键是在现有的 render_shp_as_textbox 流程中插入一个 flex 拆分层：先检测当前 .shp 是否为 flex 容器且有嵌套 div 子级，如果是就把父元素作为底框保留其样式，然后为每个子 div 估算位置和尺寸后当作伪 shape 递归渲染；如果不是就保持原有逻辑。伪 shape 需要解析 div 自身的样式属性、收集其文字内容并创建 textbox，而且这些伪 shape 本身也可能是 flex 容器，需要继续递归处理。

现在我来看看实际的 HTML 中哪些地方需要这种拆分——几乎所有复杂页面都有 flex 嵌套结构，所以需要写一个通用的递归 box 渲染器来处理。

我在定义一个函数来渲染任意位置的 box，它会解析样式、检查背景图片、提取填充色和边框，然后在幻灯片上绘制底框... Continuing with the flex layout logic...

For horizontal flex layouts, I'm calculating fixed widths and flex growth factors for each child, then distributing the available space proportionally. For vertical layouts, I'm doing the same but with heights instead, and each child gets the full width of the container.

Now I'm handling the justify-content property for vertical layouts, calculating gaps between items based on the alignment mode like space-between. Continuing with the textbox logic...

I'm refactoring the approach to keep changes minimal—keeping the existing `render_shp_as_textbox` for simple cases, but when a `.shp` is detected as a flex container with block children, I'll route it to a new `render_flex_box` function that handles the recursive flex layout. I need helper functions to parse padding, detect inline-only divs, and implement the flex box renderer itself.

For padding parsing, I'm handling the CSS shorthand variations—single value applies to all sides, two values for vertical/horizontal, three for top/horizontal/bottom, and four for individual sides. I'll extract pixel values with regex and map them to the appropriate tuple format.

Parsing padding values...

def render_shp_as_textbox(slide, shp_div: Tag):
    """顶层 .shp 的入口：解析绝对位置后转交 render_box 统一处理。"""
    style = parse_style(shp_div.get("style"))
    left = px_value(style.get("left"))
    top = px_value(style.get("top"))
    width = px_value(style.get("width"))
    height = px_value(style.get("height"))
    if left is None or top is None or width is None or height is None:
        return None
    render_box(slide, shp_div, left, top, width, height)
    return None
